data.body:
Goal:
Make the overview Release action repaint immediately when clicked instead of waiting for the rollback request to complete, while still reconciling with the server result on success or failure.

Verification:
1. Run `bun run lint` and expect success.
2. Run `bunx tsc --noEmit` and expect success.
3. Run `bun run test` and expect success.
4. Run `bun run build` and expect success.
5. Open `http://localhost:4137/beats?view=overview&state=queued`, click Release on an active beat without a terminal session, and confirm the overview updates/repaints immediately before the rollback request finishes.

Constraints:
Use the existing rollback API as the source of truth. Do not invent a separate state transition; make the client cache/UI optimistic and rollback the optimistic change if the request fails.
data.title: Release beats optimistically
